zh.lifeSummary: 當Jane de Poyntz於1303年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾多丁頓時，她的父親Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet25歲，母親Elizabeth Zouche28歲。她與Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe在英國英格蘭賀福爾易亞迪斯利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1346年在英國英格蘭享年43歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾金頓。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Jane de Poyntz was born in 1303, in Dodington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, was 25 and her mother, Elizabeth Zouche, was 28. She married Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1346, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jane de Poyntz est née en 1303, à Dodington, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Zouche, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1346, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jane de Poyntz 1303 in Dodington, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet 25 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Zouche 28. Sie hat in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1346 im Alter von 43 Jahren in England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jane de Poyntz è nata il nel 1303 nel Dodington, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Zouche, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1346, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Kington, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Jane de Poyntzが1303年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアドディントンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Malletは25歳，母Elizabeth Zoucheは28歳であった。イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーでRichard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1346年にイギリスイギリスで43歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jane de Poyntz(이)가 1303년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 도딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Zouche(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1346년 영국 잉글랜드에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jane de Poyntz nasceu em 1303, em Dodington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Zouche, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1346, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jane de Poyntz родилась в 1303 г. в местности додингтон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Zouche, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1346 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jane de Poyntz nació en 1303, en Dodington, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Nicholas Poyntz, 2nd Baron Poyntz of Curry Mallet, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Zouche, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Richard Baskerville - Lord of Eardisley and Combe en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1346, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
